text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the track for training only to find a large
group of people already there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curious, I make my way through the crowd, only
to find...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Behold! Just by having this mystical stone in your
possession, your luck will increase!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This here is a wooden bear carving that improves
disposition with a single touch! And this is a noh
mask that grants you the power of flight!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm here to share my blessings with you all, a
parcel of fortune from me to you! Please, give
them a try!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru is talking up a big show and
hawking her lucky wares to all the Umamusume
passing by.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Why, hello there, Trainer! Feel free to try one out
yourself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I start with the mask... but nothing happens.
choice_data_list: My feet are still on the ground.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well then! Don't you worry, there is still plenty of
good fortune to go around!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I just can't keep myself from winning! Left
or right, here or there, all I find is fortune at every
turn!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't that make me the luckiest Umamusume
around? Surely, it does!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's won the Kyoto Shimbun Hai, Kobe Shimbun
Hai, and Kikuka Sho, among others. Luck
certainly has been on her side. However...
choice_data_list: (I think she's getting way too carried away...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's been acting strange ever since the Kikuka
Sho. Her attitude is worrisome, to say the least.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: No sooner do I have that thought, when...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: How do you do, Matikanefukukitaru?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I'm pleased to find you in good spirits. A beautiful
autumn day, is it not?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's good to see you too, Bright! What auspicious
timing!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
We see each other quite often, but I've been
feeling a particularly special connection between
us lately.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it's because we've been competing in so
many of the same races! I have just the thing for
you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, is that so? Which of these goods are you
referring to?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: This! Behold, the Great God of Fish Cakes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! It's exactly what it sounds like—a figure
of a god carved out of a board for serving fish
cakes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It represents a fleet-footed deity. Carry it
around, and you might carve a few seconds off
your best time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Goodness! What a wonderful gift. I'm ever so
grateful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright takes the slightly misshapen Great
God of Fish Cakes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'll be sure to carry it with me every day to
reap its benefits.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yes, please do! I'm sure you'll find it to be
stupendously effective!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If not, I fear I'll never be capable of winning
against you, Matikanefukukitaru.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I may have suffered defeat at your hands on a
number of occasions, but that is all in the past
now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I am of the firm belief that true victory comes
only after a series of bitter defeats.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Soon enough, victory will come within my
reach—a truly brilliant victory.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Would you look at the time? I must be off to
my training.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Until we meet again, on the day I emerge
victorious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Beneath her serene smile, Mejiro Bright simmers
with fierce determination. As for
Matikanefukukitaru...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I can't believe it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: She will emerge victorious? Against the luckiest Umamusume on the planet?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's quite the declaration! But she forgets I am
protected by the gods! For I possess... the Fish
Cake God of War!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright's provocation is lost on
Matikanefukukitaru, who's off in her own
universe. If anything, it only makes her more
confident.
